title: Angst
body: Angst is a feeling of anxiety, apprehension, or insecurity. Anguish is its Latinate equivalent, and the words anxious and anxiety are of similar origin.
categories: Articles containing Old High German (ca. 750-1050)-language text
Articles needing additional references from September 2018
Articles with unsourced statements from June 2022
